home.heroBody:
Senior Backend Engineer focused on distributed systems, concurrency, and performance.

I design and build scalable architectures using Java, Kotlin, and Go, applying microservices and event-driven design patterns.

Experienced in solving complex problems in high-throughput environments, with a strong focus on resilience, observability, and clean architecture.

Passionate about evolving backend systems toward modern architectures with AI integration and real-time processing.
home.stackItems: Angular · TypeScript · Node · Java · Kotlin · Go · Python · Rust · AWS · React · Docker · Kubernetes · Terraform · Git · CI/CD · Microservices · Event-Driven Architecture · Clean Architecture · Observability · Resilience · Concurrency · Performance · AI Integration · Real-Time Processing
